growth_records.cite: Madin JS et al. A synthesis of bacterial and archaeal phenotypic trait data. Sci Data 7:170 (2020); source dataset: silva.
growth_records.notes: growth_rate_per_h computed as ln(2)/doubling_time_h. Species-level trait record; culture mode/pH often unspecified; medium + uptake/secretion pending literature curation.

growth_records.cite: Georgoulis et al. Genome-Wide Identification of Tomato Xylem Sap Fitness Factors for Three Plant-Pathogenic Ralstonia Species. mSystems (2021). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.01229-21. [PMC8562481]
growth_records.snippet: Rich medium cultures were grown to saturation (20 to 24 h; 5 or 6 cell doublings)...
growth_records.notes: Same shared CPG growth-to-saturation data as GMI1000 record (paper does not report per-strain doubling counts for CPG): 20-24 h, 5-6 doublings. Midpoint calc: doubling_time_h=22/5.5=4.0h; mu=ln2/4.0=0.1733 h-1. [metadata completed from paper Methods: pH]

growth_records.cite: Georgoulis et al. Genome-Wide Identification of Tomato Xylem Sap Fitness Factors for Three Plant-Pathogenic Ralstonia Species. mSystems (2021). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.01229-21. [PMC8562481]
growth_records.snippet: minimal medium cultures were grown for over 48 h (...4 doublings for strain IBSBF1503).
growth_records.notes: IBSBF1503 achieved 4 doublings in >48 h in minimal medium. doubling_time_h = 48/4 = 12.0 h; mu = ln2/12.0 = 0.0578 h-1. This is an upper-bound mu estimate (lower-bound doubling time) since actual incubation time exceeded 48 h.
